impact: This advances the PP&D DevHub recorder plan with deterministic, privacy-safe fixtures and validation before any authenticated automation or live portal interaction.
summary: Add redacted DevHub recorder transition fixture coverage for save-for-later, back/continue, upload validation, and draft resume states.
target_task: Task checkbox-39: Add mocked DevHub recorder transition fixtures for save-for-later, back/continue navigation, upload validation messages, and draft-resume states using only redacted fixture data.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
